title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by 0bps at their June 2026 meeting?

current.rationale_summary: A rate hike at a single meeting during an established hold cycle is essentially unprecedented absent a crisis; Fed held in April with no hike signal, CPI ~3.8% and unemployment 4.3% are not emergency triggers, and futures imply ~99% no-hike.
reference_classes: Fed hiking at a single meeting in a hold cycle <1%
